Task 1 - Fix Admin Production Build

Fix the Next.js 
production build failures affecting:

/support
/integrations
/audit-logs

The reported cause is 
useSearchParams() requiring an appropriate Suspense boundary during prerendering.

Use the recommended Next.js 
architecture for this issue. Prefer keeping the route/page as a Server Component where practical and moving the 
useSearchParams() logic into a dedicated Client Component wrapped in <Suspense>, rather than converting unnecessary 
parts of the application to client rendering.

Preserve all existing Phase 1-7 functionality and deep-link query 
parameter behavior.

After the fix, run:

Admin typecheck
Admin lint
Admin production build

The production 
build must pass before Phase 8.

Task 2 - Investigate the failing Sprint 5 test

logic or test yet.
